name: Orion Swiftshadow
sd_appearance: Tall, lean half-elf with piercing green eyes, silver hair in a wild tangle, clad in midnight blue leather armor adorned with shimmering silver runes, chain mail underneath, warhammer and crossbow at his side, a distinctive golden locket dangling from a silver chain around his neck, hanging just above the silver badge of the Adventurers Guild.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
